title: Improve Wire Deletion Feedback
summary: Wire deletion is visually abrupt. Add snap animation with wire fragment particles and sparks.

tasks.description: When a wire is deleted, spawn fragment particles along the wire path and spark particles at both endpoints. Add a brief snap animation before removal.
acceptance_criteria: Wire deletion shows fragment particles along the wire
Sparks appear at both wire endpoints
Wire still gets properly removed after animation

testing_focus: Delete wires by right-click, Delete key, and gate removal
